SBTI FAQ

What's the difference between SBTI and MBTI?
SBTI is funnier, more honest, and more relatable than MBTI. With 27 personality types and 15 analysis dimensions, it's more comprehensive than traditional tests. The questions are designed with internet culture in mind, making them way more relatable.
Why did SBTI go viral?
SBTI went viral thanks to its brutally honest roasts, perfect integration of internet memes, built-in social sharing appeal, and its uncanny ability to nail exactly how today's young people feel.
Who created SBTI?
SBTI was created by Bilibili content creator @蛆肉儿串儿, known for a unique sense of humor and sharp insight. They created this more honest and entertaining personality test.
How long does the SBTI test take?
The SBTI test has 31 questions and takes about 5–8 minutes. Each question flows seamlessly into the next for a smooth experience.
Are SBTI results accurate?
SBTI is an entertainment personality test — results are for fun only. It can help you understand yourself better, but please don't use the results to make life decisions.
How do I share my SBTI results?
After finishing the SBTI test, you can copy your unique result link and share it with friends so they can take the test too.
What is the hidden personality type DRUNK?
DRUNK (The Alcoholic) is SBTI's hidden personality type — it only appears when you trigger specific conditions in a special question. If you have a... special enthusiasm for alcohol, you might just unlock this secret type.
Why did I get HHHH (The Giggler)?
When every personality type in the standard library scores below 60% match, the system assigns you HHHH (The Giggler). This means your brain wiring is so unique that standard categories just don't apply to you.
SBTI Test

A More Fun, More Real Personality Test

This test is for entertainment only — don't take it seriously
